message:
fix(interactive): enable syntax highlighting in Prompt and Select prompt rendering

When markup mode is enabled for Prompt and Select widgets, the prompt
text was rendered with markup parsing but without syntax highlighting.
This caused Rich-style markup tags in prompts to be parsed but not
visually highlighted, making them appear as plain text.

Add .with_highlight(self.markup) to the PrintOptions in both
Prompt::make_prompt() and Select::make_prompt() so that syntax
highlighting is applied whenever markup mode is active, consistent
with how other interactive widgets render their prompts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
